guidance_detail: Q2 FY2027 revenue guided to $91B +/-2% (up ~11% sequentially), driven by data center; full-year gross margin expected mid-70s; FY27 tax rate lowered to 16-18% from prior 17-19%; quarterly dividend raised $0.01->$0.25; new $80B buyback on top of $39B remaining.
risk_factors: China export controls / H200 license uncertainty - no China data-center compute revenue in outlook
Supply constraints - expects to remain supply-constrained through Vera Rubin's product life
Higher memory and system prices softened consumer edge demand
